Mrs. Good motioned for ice to move past her (she lived there) but instead, they got out of their vehicle, and tried pulling her out of hers, for absolutely no reason. Unmarked vehicles and covered faces IS illegal. Using lethal weapons, as ice agents who ARE NOT law enforcement, IS illegal. Walking to her car, pulling on her door handle, that violates the 4th amendment of unlawful seizure, regardless if successful or not. Especially with this happening before him unaliving her, he lost his qualified immunity. Ice agents cannot force you out of your vehical without a judicial warrant signed by a judge. They cannot force or prevent departure, or do random traffice stops. He positioned himself in front of her vehicle, as she was trying to drive away, when he had multiple chances to de-escalate the situation. it was officer induced jeopardy. His reactions to her actions were not on proportion to the danger of the situation. (Making it illegal, yes.) He had his lethal weapon out before she even started moving her vehicle. He let three rounds go into her, (only 1 bull3t on the far right bottom corner of the windshield, while the rest went into the side of her open driver side window. If she was unalived not by the first bull3t, but by the second, or third...) when she was just trying to leave a dangerous situation that THEY put her in. If the situation was so dangerous, why was he the only one who pulled his weapon? He walked to her car, that had crashed, completely fine. They didn't let a doctor who was at the scene tend to her. When medical care did come? The Ice agents had their cars blocking the road, not moving, and the medics had to WALK to her crashed car. Which again, is illegal. Only to flee the scene afterwards. If you want to say that what she did was illegal, then they could have went to court for it. But she doesn't have that option, thanks to him. She was white. If you think you're safe, no matter what ethnicity you are, you're not. Her unalivement proved that.
